task.title: Prometheus sample dashboards
task.shortdesc: The RMF exposes Monitor III data to third-party tools using the OpenMetrics exposition format.

prereq.p: You must apply OA67701 to use the Prometheus sample dashboards.

context.p: The Prometheus sample dashboards are included in the plugin.You can use the sample dashboards provided with Prometheus-compatible platforms such as Grafana Mimir and VictoriaMetrics.

step.cmd: Install and deploy the plugin. See Installing the RMF for z/OS plugin on Grafana.
Configure Prometheus to scrape the metrics exposed by RMF Distributed Data Server. For more information, refer to the Prometheus documentation.
step.info:
Some of the scrape target definition examples for Prometheus are as follows:
To scrape all the configured metrics as defined in DDS GPMOMC:- job_name: "m3@plex00" scrape_interval: 100s # Should be equal to the Monitor III mintime scrape_timeout: 50s metrics_path: /metrics/m3 static_configs: - targets: [ "ddshostname:8803" ]
To scrape all the CPC and LPAR related metrics as defined in DDS GPMOMC:- job_name: "m3@plex00" scrape_interval: 100s # Should be equal to the Monitor III mintime scrape_timeout: 50s metrics_path: /metrics/m3 params: groups: cpcs,lpars static_configs: - targets: [ "ddshostname:8803" ]

step.cmd: Create a Prometheus data source in Grafana pointing to the Prometheus server. For more information, refer to the Grafana documentation.
